title: stylophorum lasiocarpum
intro: Stylophorum lasiocarpum, also known as yellow poppy mallow or western mayapple, is a perennial plant native to eastern North America. The plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Stylophorum lasiocarpum include its potential to relieve symptoms of menstrual cramps, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. Stylophorum lasiocarpum can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion, and its root bark is often used in traditional herbal remedies.
